title: SCHOOL SUPPLIES DONATIONS - 211info
text: SALVATION ARMY RAY & JOAN KROC CORPS SCHOOL SUPPLIES DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts basic school supplies such as pencils, paper, art supplies, binders, backpacks, or monetary donations. Offers an option to sponsor a child. 1865 Bill Frey Drive NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 5:30am-9pm, Saturday 7am--9pm Email (503) 798-4876 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 566-5762 Main phone (503) 585-6688 Family Services Main phone (503) 798-4876 Family Services Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 5:30am-9pm, Saturday 7am-9pm, Sunday 1pm-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Cherriots bus routes 3, 11, 23 Services: School Supplies Donation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT PAYMENT ASSISTANCE LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - ARTS & EDUCATION LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - CAMPS LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - FITNESS LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - SWIMMING FACILITY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
